title: Simple Loot Bags
description: A Very Simple but Customizable Implementation of loot bags.
body:
# Ever Wanted to have loot bags in minecraft?

I have the solution for you!

The world now has lootbags ranging from common to epic, they are dropped by hostile mobs when killed by **players**, you can also combine lower tiered ones to get better ones, and all of that in a very configurable manner!

you can customize the number of items, the chance of one dropping, what mobs are considered what category and even the items that drop!
